headlines.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
headlines.summary: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, yapay zeka modeli ve altyapi yarisinda yeni urun, yatirim veya platform hamlelerinin surdugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: YZ altyapi yarisi sermaye akislarini, cip talebini ve platform kazananlarini belirler. Bu sinyal özellikle ai, chip ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard settle merchant claims
headlines.summary: About 65 retailers suing the networks over card swipe fees in a New York case have now settled claims.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, visa ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Mama Shelter and MOB Hotel named best affordable Paris hotels by the Michelin Guide
political_items.summary: Nine hotels across the city that trade central location for personality, design and great neighborhoods

political_items.title: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
political_items.summary: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.

political_items.title: Mexico's Sheinbaum denies 'diplomatic crisis' with Spain after conquest row
political_items.summary: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.

political_items.title: Building of Trump's White House ballroom can resume in full, appeals court says
political_items.summary: Construction at the White House is expected to continue until the next hearing, due in June.
